name: Sweet Potato Pie (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Mash the hot potatoes in a large bowl.
3. Add butter and mix well.
4. Stir in sugar and eggs.
5. Add milk and vanilla, stirring to combine.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pie crusts.
7. Bake for 1 hour.
8. Serve at room temperature or warm.
